sentences.arabic: كَانَ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ يَحْفَظُ الْقُرْآنَ مُنْذُ صِغَرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Abdurrahman je učio Kur'an napamet od malena.
sentences.translationEn: Abdurrahman had been memorizing the Quran since childhood.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ أُمُّهُ تُشَجِّعُهُ وَتُكَرِّرُ مَعَهُ الْآيَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka ga je poticala i ponavljala s njim ajete.
sentences.translationEn: His mother encouraged him and repeated the verses with him.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظَ عِدَّةَ سُوَرٍ قَصِيرَةٍ وَهُوَ سَعِيدٌ.
sentences.translation: Zapamtio je nekoliko kratkih sura i bio je sretan.
sentences.translationEn: He memorized several short surahs and was happy.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْأُمُّ تَقُولُ: أَنْتَ فَخْرُنَا يَا بُنَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Majka bi govorila: Ti si naš ponos, sinčiću.
sentences.translationEn: The mother would say: You are our pride my son.
